scope: Validation Referee / Promotion Arbiter / Fallback Honesty / Regression Watcher. Proposal-only doctrine.
doctrine: Layer 4 never mutates the active registry, active brain bundle, or factor_validation_* tables. Every output is a RegistryUpdateProposalV1 or a PromotionGatePacketV1. Final write stays with the governed build-metis-brain-bundle-from-factor-validation CLI run by a human operator.

coverage: validation referee rejects invalid from/to states
promotion arbiter outputs overall=pass when all 4 gates pass
promotion arbiter outputs overall=fail with failing_step list
fallback honesty emits downgrade proposal with gate_fail:* blocking reasons
regression watcher emits EvaluationPacketV1 with evaluation_kind=regression_detected
governance queue worker escalates RegistryUpdateProposalV1 to surface_action_queue
layer never writes to registry/factor_validation (asserted by packet target_layer only)
